mapper.sql: robot_id, current_mode, last_mode_switch_time, mode_switch_count, need_auto_charge, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_robot_ext WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT FROM sys_robot_ext
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_robot_ext ( robot_id, current_mode, mode_switch_count, need_auto_charge, create_by, del_flag, create_time ) VALUES ( #{robotId}, #{currentMode}, #{modeSwitchCount}, #{needAutoCharge}, #{createBy}, #{delFlag}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_robot_ext SET current_mode = #{modeId}, last_mode_switch_time = NOW(), mode_switch_count = mode_switch_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE sys_robot_ext SET need_auto_charge = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE sys_robot_ext SET need_auto_charge = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT need_auto_charge FROM sys_robot_ext WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_robot_ext SET del_flag = '2', update_time = NOW() WHERE robot_id IN
#{robotId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_robot_ext WHERE robot_id IN
#{robotId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_robot_mode_config (robot_id, mode_id, config, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{robotId}, #{modeId}, #{config}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config = #{config}, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT current_mode as "currentMode", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM sys_robot_ext WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY current_mode ORDER BY current_mode
SELECT FROM sys_robot_ext WHERE del_flag = '0' AND last_mode_switch_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY last_mode_switch_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_robot_ext SET last_mode_switch_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE sys_robot_ext SET mode_switch_count = mode_switch_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0'
